items.title: Spain are world champions - World Cup Daily
items.summary: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning , John Brewin, Jonathan Wilson and Sid Lowe as Spain win the 2026 World Cup. Rate, review, share on Apple Podcasts and join the conversation on email . On the podcast today; Spain win the world cup for the 2nd time in their history. Has a team ever deserved
